2347520.name: Starithm
2347520.description: A nostalgic/classic Isometric RTS!  Become the dominant star-fairing-civilization throughout the procedurally generated star systems.  The player must:  (1) Establish a government ideology; (2) Populate said civilization; (3) Develop military assets; (4) Compete economically, diplomatically, and/or militarily; (5) Research/develop technologies, including artificial evolutions; (6) Recreate / redefine humanity; (7) Conduct cyber attacks upon enemies; (8) Situationally maintain peace, or wage war.
2347520.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
